# defectdojo_network_location (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo Network Location

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_network_location" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `location` (String) Location of network testing: Examples: VPN, Internet or Internal
